caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" and a green cap, along with headphones. The setting appears to be a studio or a room with a casual yet professional atmosphere, as evidenced by the framed photographs on the wall behind him and the clothing racks visible in the background. The man seems engaged in conversation, possibly discussing topics related to work or personal experiences. The environment suggests a relaxed yet focused discussion, with the man actively contributing to the dialogue.
